---
title: "Research"
permalink: /research/
---

## Under Review

[Homeschooling as Racial Retreat: The Impact of School District and Leadership Diversity](https://osf.io/preprints/socarxiv/zga2e_v1)

[The Personnel Costs of Nationalization: Culture War Conflicts Lead to School Superintendent Turnover](https://osf.io/preprints/socarxiv/sn2p4_v1) (with Erik Peterson, Tyler Simko, Josh McCrain, and Rachel White)

[Unacceptable or "Part of the Job?" Public (In)Tolerance for Threats Against Women Politicians](https://osf.io/preprints/osf/4r29w_v3) (with Tabitha Koch and Kishan Bhakta) ***Revise & Resubmit at Politics, Groups, and Identities.***

[Bystanders on Social Media: Audience Moderation and the Spread of Online Extremism](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1t0uDJFp0w5Gp1YFr1LUt71CCfKYVIDcN/view?usp=sharing) (with Conner Joyce and Agustin Prinetti)

## Working Papers

[How Should Politicians Respond to Violent Threats? A Gendered Explanation of How the Public Views Responses to Threats of Violence](https://osf.io/preprints/socarxiv/eb6vu_v1) (with Kishan Bhakta, Tabitha Koch, and Jonathan Homola) *Winner, Marian Irish Award for Best Paper on Women and Politics, SPSA 2024*

Examining Threats Against Women Politicians: Is the Public Less Tolerant of Threats Against White Women?
